channel.title: The Cloudflare Blog
channel.description: Get the latest news on how products at Cloudflare are built, technologies used, and join the teams helping to build a better Internet.

item.title: 【Introducing Custom Regions for precision data control】引入自定义区域以实现精确数据控制
item.description: 【 We are expanding Regional Services with new pre-defined regions and the launch of Custom Regions. Customers can now define precise geographical boundaries for data processing, tailored to meet their compliance and performance needs. 】我们正在通过新的预定义区域和自定义区域的推出来扩展区域服务。客户现在可以定义精确的数据处理地理边界，以满足其合规性和性能需求。

item.title: 【Standing up for the open Internet: why we appealed Italy’s "Piracy Shield" fine】捍卫开放互联网：我们为何对意大利的“盗版盾”罚款提出上诉
item.description: 【 Cloudflare is appealing a €14 million fine from Italian regulators over "Piracy Shield," a system that forces providers to block content without oversight. We are challenging this framework to protect the Internet from disproportionate overblocking and lack of due process. 】Cloudflare 对意大利监管机构就“盗版盾”罚款 1400 万欧元提出上诉，该系统迫使提供商在没有监督的情况下屏蔽内容。我们正在挑战这一框架，以保护互联网免受不成比例的过度封锁和缺乏正当程序的影响。

item.title: 【From legacy architecture to Cloudflare One】从遗留架构到 Cloudflare One
item.description: 【 Learn how Cloudflare and CDW de-risk SASE migrations with a blueprint that treats legacy debt as an application modernization project. 】了解 Cloudflare 和 CDW 如何通过将遗留债务视为应用程序现代化项目的蓝图来降低 SASE 迁移风险。

item.title: 【Announcing Cloudflare Account Abuse Protection: prevent fraudulent attacks from bots and humans】宣布推出 Cloudflare 帐户滥用保护：防止来自机器人和人类的欺诈性攻击
item.description: 【 Blocking bots isn’t enough anymore. Cloudflare’s new fraud prevention capabilities — now available in Early Access — help stop account abuse before it starts. 】阻止机器人已经不够了。 Cloudflare 的新欺诈预防功能（现已提供抢先体验）有助于在帐户滥用发生之前阻止其发生。

item.title: 【Slashing agent token costs by 98% with RFC 9457-compliant error responses】通过符合 RFC 9457 的错误响应，将代理令牌成本削减 98%
item.description: 【 Cloudflare now returns RFC 9457-compliant structured Markdown and JSON error payloads to AI agents, replacing heavyweight HTML pages with machine-readable instructions. This reduces token usage by over 98%, turning brittle parsing into efficient control flow. 】Cloudflare 现在将符合 RFC 9457 的结构化 Markdown 和 JSON 错误负载返回给 AI 代理，用机器可读指令替换重量级 HTML 页面。这减少了超过 98% 的令牌使用量，将脆弱的解析转变为高效的控制流。

item.title: 【AI Security for Apps is now generally available】AI 应用安全现已全面推出
item.description: 【 Cloudflare AI Security for Apps is now generally available, providing a security layer to discover and protect AI-powered applications, regardless of the model or hosting provider. We are also making AI discovery free for all plans, to help teams find and secure shadow AI deployments. 】Cloudflare AI Security for Apps 现已全面推出，提供安全层来发现和保护人工智能驱动的应用程序，无论模型或托管提供商如何。我们还为所有计划免费提供人工智能发现，以帮助团队找到并保护影子人工智能部署。

item.title: 【Investigating multi-vector attacks in Log Explorer】在 Log Explorer 中调查多向量攻击
item.description: 【 Log Explorer customers can now identify and investigate multi-vector attacks. Log Explorer supports 14 additional Cloudflare datasets, enabling users to have a 360-degree view of their network. 】Log Explorer 客户现在可以识别和调查多向量攻击。 Log Explorer 支持 14 个附加 Cloudflare 数据集，使用户能够 360 度查看其网络。

item.title: 【Building a security overview dashboard for actionable insights】构建安全概览仪表板以获取可行的见解
item.description: 【 Cloudflare's new Security Overview dashboard transforms overwhelming security data into prioritized, actionable insights, empowering defenders with contextual intelligence on vulnerabilities. 】Cloudflare 的新安全概述仪表板将大量的安全数据转化为优先的、可操作的见解，为防御者提供有关漏洞的上下文情报。

item.title: 【Translating risk insights into actionable protection: leveling up security posture with Cloudflare and Mastercard】将风险洞察转化为可行的保护：利用 Cloudflare 和 Mastercard 提升安全态势
item.description: 【 Cloudflare will be integrating Mastercard’s RiskRecon attack surface intelligence capabilities to help you eliminate Internet-facing blind spots while continuously monitoring and closing security gaps. 】Cloudflare 将集成万事达卡的 RiskRecon 攻击面情报功能，帮助您消除面向互联网的盲点，同时持续监控和缩小安全漏洞。

item.title: 【Fixing request smuggling vulnerabilities in Pingora OSS deployments】修复 Pingora OSS 部署中的请求走私漏洞
item.description: 【 Today we’re disclosing request smuggling vulnerabilities when our open source Pingora service is deployed as an ingress proxy and how we’ve fixed them in Pingora 0.8.0. 】今天，我们将披露当我们的开源 Pingora 服务部署为入口代理时存在的请求走私漏洞，以及我们如何在 Pingora 0.8.0 中修复这些漏洞。
